sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115447" key="yeuda/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδάριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n115447.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fallacy,</tr_> in pl. title of work by Euclid, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg011:p.70F" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Euc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.70F.</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg011:p.59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.59</biblScope> </bibl> F.</sense> </entryFree>
